title: Expressive Speech Corpus
description: Record and annotate expressive speech across emotions, speaking styles, and accents. Data trains next-generation TTS models that capture nuance beyond neutral read speech — emphasis, hesitation, excitement, whisper, and conversational cadence.

tasks.title: Record speech sample
tasks.description: Read the given script in the specified emotion/style. 30–90 seconds per sample. Quiet environment, consistent mic distance.

tasks.title: Emotion & style annotation
tasks.description: Listen to the recording, label primary emotion (happy/sad/angry/neutral/excited/whisper), speaking rate (slow/normal/fast), mark emphasis words, flag pronunciation issues.

tasks.title: Audio quality check
tasks.description: SNR threshold, clipping detection, silence ratio, pronunciation alignment score.
